name: OpenAdapt
desc: Open-source adapter between multimodal models and desktop/web GUIs. Record a workflow once, then compile it into a deterministic, self-healing replay (openadap…
descFull: Open-source adapter between multimodal models and desktop/web GUIs. Record a workflow once, then compile it into a deterministic, self-healing replay (openadapt-flow) — or condition, train, and evaluate agents on it. Modular meta-package; install only the extras you need.
